task_text: portal-migration-srilu-design — v2 design after plan-review BLOCKER+MEDIUMs. Pivot from "patch shift-agent-deploy.sh" to "separate tools/deploy-portal.sh standalone script." Eliminates agent-deploy coupling per R1-M1. Final shape: tools/deploy-portal.sh (NEW, ~50 LOC: scp + install + systemctl) + src/platform/systemd/triveni-portal.service (NEW, ~25 LOC with fixed ReadWritePaths + ProtectHome=read-only). No changes to shift-agent-deploy.sh or build-deploy-tarball.sh. Portal updates decouple entirely from agent deploys.
